message:
Fix overseer agent creation and improve contact error guidance

- Align the HumanOverseer INSERT with the Agent schema by writing attachments_policy and using inception_ts so the overseer bootstrap no longer fails silently when the Web UI sends its first message.\n- Expand the CONTACT_REQUIRED error text to list blocked recipients and embed ready-to-run macro_contact_handshake/request_contact examples using repr-safe values, so agents see the next steps even when names contain quotes.\n- Note when auto-handshake attempts already ran so operators know whether they must wait or retry manually.

files.patch:
@@ -2464,7 +2464,28 @@ async def send_message(
                         pass
                 if blocked_recipients:
                     err_type: str = "CONTACT_REQUIRED"
-                    err_msg: str = "Recipient requires contact approval or recent context."
+                    blocked_sorted = sorted(set(blocked_recipients))
+                    recipient_list = ", ".join(blocked_sorted)
+                    sample_target = blocked_sorted[0]
+                    project_expr = repr(project.human_key)
+                    sender_expr = repr(sender.name)
+                    target_expr = repr(sample_target)
+                    err_msg_parts = [
+                        f"Contact approval required for recipients: {recipient_list}.",
+                        (
+                            "Before retrying, request approval with "
+                            f"`request_contact(project_key={project_expr}, from_agent={sender_expr}, "
+                            f"to_agent={target_expr})` or run "
+                            f"`macro_contact_handshake(project_key={project_expr}, requester={sender_expr}, "
+                            f"target={target_expr}, auto_accept=True)`."
+                        ),
+                        "Alternatively, send your message inside a recent thread that already includes them by reusing its thread_id.",
+                    ]
+                    if attempted:
+                        err_msg_parts.append(
+                            f"Automatic handshake attempts already ran for: {', '.join(attempted)}; wait for approval or retry the suggested calls explicitly."
+                        )
+                    err_msg: str = " ".join(err_msg_parts)
                     err_data: dict[str, Any] = {
                         "recipients_blocked": sorted(set(blocked_recipients)),
                         "remedies": remedies,

@@ -2218,8 +2218,28 @@ async def overseer_send(project: str, request: Request) -> JSONResponse:
                         # Create HumanOverseer agent (use INSERT OR IGNORE to handle race conditions)
                         await session.execute(
                             text("""
-                                INSERT OR IGNORE INTO agents (project_id, name, program, model, task_description, contact_policy, created_ts, last_active_ts)
-                                VALUES (:pid, :name, :program, :model, :task, :policy, :ts, :ts)
+                                INSERT OR IGNORE INTO agents (
+                                    project_id,
+                                    name,
+                                    program,
+                                    model,
+                                    task_description,
+                                    contact_policy,
+                                    attachments_policy,
+                                    inception_ts,
+                                    last_active_ts
+                                )
+                                VALUES (
+                                    :pid,
+                                    :name,
+                                    :program,
+                                    :model,
+                                    :task,
+                                    :policy,
+                                    :attachments_policy,
+                                    :ts,
+                                    :ts
+                                )
                             """),
                             {
                                 "pid": project_id,
@@ -2228,8 +2248,9 @@ async def overseer_send(project: str, request: Request) -> JSONResponse:
                                 "model": "Human",
                                 "task": "Human operator providing guidance and oversight to agents",
                                 "policy": "open",
-                                "ts": datetime.now(timezone.utc)
-                            }
+                                "attachments_policy": "auto",
+                                "ts": datetime.now(timezone.utc),
+                            },
                         )
                         # Don't commit yet - wait until message is successfully created and written to Git
